name: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking
tagline: 9B reasoning-focused vision-language model that outperforms much larger models on many benchmarks; the first GLM-V 'Thinking' release.
metaDescription: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking (Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM)), released 2025-07-01 — part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. 9B reasoning-focused vision-language model that outp…
overview: GLM-4.1V-9B-Thinking is a large language model from Z.ai (Zhipu / GLM), part of the GLM-V (vision-language) line. Released 2025-07-01. Open-weight vision-language models for multimodal reasoning, GUI agents and document/image understanding.
What's notable in this version: 9B reasoning-focused vision-language model that outperforms much larger models on many benchmarks; the first GLM-V 'Thinking' release.
